target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade extensively missing; roof collapsed; debris pile covers ground level; structural framing appears intact but non-load-bearing elements completely destroyed; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The target building shows complete collapse of its upper structure; debris piles at ground level; facade is missing; structural integrity is compromised; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition for framed buildings.

summary: Two buildings assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence levels, both showing extensive facade loss, collapsed upper structures, and debris piles consistent with 75-100% damage. The overall scene depicts a street-level view of severely damaged multi-story buildings with rubble-strewn ground and a single intact vehicle parked in front. The functional impact is likely complete loss of building usability and potential obstruction of movement due to debris and structural collapse.
